name: legal-processes-map
description: D3 treemap visualizing legal team workload and automation potential

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && esbuild src/client/treemap.ts --bundle --outfile=public/treemap.js --platform=browser --target=es2020 && esbuild src/client/table.ts --bundle --outfile=public/table.js --platform=browser --target=es2020
